title: phyllanthus keyensis
intro: Phyllanthus keyensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as the Key Island tree or Key Island phyllanthus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to support liver health and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Phyllanthus keyensis include its potential to protect against liver damage, improve liver function, and aid in the treatment of various liver-related diseases such as hepatitis and cirrhosis. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
